_comment: Pterodactyl PTDL_v2 egg for the custom ONLYOFFICE Docs image
name: ONLYOFFICE Docs
author: ckateptb@vivaldi.net
description: Single-allocation ONLYOFFICE Docs for Pterodactyl. The custom image contains the installer and rootless runtime, serves HTTP and WebSocket traffic on the assigned port, enables JWT authentication, and keeps mutable state in the server volume. TLS is expected to terminate at an external reverse proxy such as Cloudflare.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -Eeuo pipefail

readonly IMAGE_INSTALLER=/opt/onlyoffice-egg/install.sh

if [[ ! -x "$IMAGE_INSTALLER" ]]; then
	printf '[Installer] ERROR: supported ONLYOFFICE Docs image is missing %s\n' "$IMAGE_INSTALLER" >&2
	exit 1
fi

exec "$IMAGE_INSTALLER"

variables.name: JWT Secret
variables.description: Shared secret used by ONLYOFFICE Docs and its Nextcloud connector. Leave empty to generate and persist a strong secret during installation.

variables.name: JWT Header
variables.description: HTTP header carrying the connector JWT. Configure the identical value in Nextcloud.

variables.name: Allow Private Storage Addresses
variables.description: Permit document storage on private or local IP ranges. Keep disabled unless the trusted Nextcloud server is reachable only through a private address.

variables.name: Allow Untrusted Storage TLS
variables.description: Accept invalid or self-signed TLS certificates from document storage. Keep disabled for public or production Nextcloud instances.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Minimum ONLYOFFICE Docs application log severity.

variables.name: Nginx Access Log
variables.description: Write one access-log entry per HTTP request. Disabled by default to keep the Pterodactyl console and disk usage compact.

variables.name: Upload Limit
variables.description: Maximum request body accepted by the bundled Nginx server, for example 512M or 2G.
